import nl.tsym.tackbox.report.Report;

// JV010 (D007 msg-static + D008 dedupKey): a Report user-lane verb must carry a
// static-literal msg and a well-formed literal dedupKey.
class ReporterArgs {
    void dynamicMsgFires(String detail) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            Report.error(detail, e, null, "net.fail"); // want "JV010.*msg must be a static"
        }
    }

    void dedupMissingFires() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            Report.error("disk write failed", e, null); // want "JV010.*dedupKey is required"
        }
    }

    void dedupNotLiteralFires(String key) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            Report.error("disk write failed", e, null, key); // want "JV010.*dedupKey must be a static"
        }
    }

    void dedupBadFormatFires() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            Report.error("disk write failed", e, null, "BadKey"); // want "JV010.*area.suffix"
        }
    }

    // quiet is telemetry-only: msg-static (D007) does not apply, but the
    // dedupKey (D008) still does - a valid literal key keeps it clean.
    void quietDynamicMsgClean(String detail) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            Report.quiet(detail, e, null, "cache.refresh");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
